message:
fix(security,tui): harden static file serving against symlink traversal, deduplicate dashboard footer widgets on dense surfaces

Static file serving (static_files.rs):
- Replace Option-based file lookup with a three-variant FileLookup enum
  (Found/Missing/Blocked) to distinguish missing files from blocked
  symlink traversal attempts. Previously, symlink-blocked requests
  fell through to the SPA fallback and served index.html content.
- Add should_spa_fallback() gate: only route-like paths (no file
  extension) fall back to the SPA shell. Requests for missing assets
  like /vendor/missing.js now correctly return None instead of the
  SPA index.
- Port the same Found/Missing/Blocked semantics to the non-unix
  open_relative_file implementation.
- Update tests: symlink traversal through both file and directory
  symlinks now asserts None (blocked) instead of serving content.
  Add web_root_missing_asset_does_not_fall_back_to_index test.

Static export (static_export.rs):
- Replace bare create_dir_all with ensure_real_directory, adding
  symlink-aware validation for the export output path.
- Add test: export rejects output dirs whose parent is a symlink.

Bundle packaging (bundle.rs):
- Add symlink_metadata check before writing zip bundles: refuse to
  write through a symlinked destination path.
- Replace create_dir_all with ensure_real_directory for parent dirs.
- Add test: zip packaging rejects symlinked destination parent.

Deploy validation (deploy.rs):
- Add bundle_symlink_descendants validation check that recursively
  scans the bundle directory for any symlinked entries and fails
  the deploy report if found.
- Add test: validate_bundle rejects bundles containing symlinks.

Dashboard TUI (dashboard.rs):
- Introduce InsightRailLayout enum to classify the active insight
  rail density (Hidden/Compact/Ultrawide/Supergrid/Megagrid) once
  per render pass and pass it to the bottom rail renderer.
- Add PreviewFooterMode enum to control which support widgets the
  preview footer renders based on insight density, preventing
  duplicated metrics/flow panels on supergrid/megagrid surfaces.
- Extract split_insight_rail() from render_insight_rail() for reuse
  by the layout classifier.
- Add height-aware fallback for SignalsOnly mode: if aux column is
  shorter than 10 rows, render a single Message Flow panel instead
  of splitting and risking empty signal panels.
- Add should_force_preview_query_only() to gate the megagrid
  preview/query-only shortcut behind the ultrawide footer breakpoint.
- Add tests for layout classification, footer mode policy, and
  preview-query-only breakpoint behavior.

Agents TUI (agents.rs):
- Fix test_state() to use in-memory SQLite database URL.
- Fix rebuild_from_state test to use empty project strings matching
  AgentIdentity::new("", name) semantics from AgentSummary.

E2E tests (test_idempotency.sh):
- Fix shadow-repair alias disable count assertions to be relative
  (before + 1) rather than absolute (== 1), making the test robust
  to prior alias disable markers from earlier test cases.

MCP config (codex/cursor/gemini.mcp.json):
- Update bearer tokens to current value.

Beads maintenance:
- Prune 6 stale .br_history snapshots (Feb 12-13 2026).
- Add .br_recovery artifacts from database recovery operation.
- Update issues.jsonl with dashboard bug fix progress comments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -289,6 +289,9 @@ e2e_case_banner "Same-version reinstall repairs active Python am shadow"
 printf "\nalias am='python -m mcp_agent_mail'\n" >> "${TEST_HOME}/.zshrc"
 printf "\nalias am='python -m mcp_agent_mail'\n" >> "${TEST_HOME}/.bashrc"
 
+ZSH_ALIAS_DISABLE_COUNT_BEFORE_REPAIR="$(count_literal_in_file "${TEST_HOME}/.zshrc" "Disabled by mcp-agent-mail Rust installer: alias am='python -m mcp_agent_mail'")"
+BASH_ALIAS_DISABLE_COUNT_BEFORE_REPAIR="$(count_literal_in_file "${TEST_HOME}/.bashrc" "Disabled by mcp-agent-mail Rust installer: alias am='python -m mcp_agent_mail'")"
+
 run_installer "case_03_same_version_repairs_python_shadow" "0.1.0" "$ARTIFACT_V010"
 e2e_assert_exit_code "shadow-repair reinstall exits 0" "0" "$LAST_INSTALL_RC"
 e2e_assert_not_contains "shadow-repair reinstall does not short-circuit as healthy" "$LAST_INSTALL_STDOUT" "ok mcp-agent-mail v0.1.0 is already installed"
@@ -311,8 +314,8 @@ fi
 
 ZSH_ALIAS_DISABLE_COUNT_REPAIR="$(count_literal_in_file "${TEST_HOME}/.zshrc" "Disabled by mcp-agent-mail Rust installer: alias am='python -m mcp_agent_mail'")"
 BASH_ALIAS_DISABLE_COUNT_REPAIR="$(count_literal_in_file "${TEST_HOME}/.bashrc" "Disabled by mcp-agent-mail Rust installer: alias am='python -m mcp_agent_mail'")"
-e2e_assert_eq "shadow-repair reinstall comments zsh alias once" "1" "$ZSH_ALIAS_DISABLE_COUNT_REPAIR"
-e2e_assert_eq "shadow-repair reinstall comments bash alias once" "1" "$BASH_ALIAS_DISABLE_COUNT_REPAIR"
+e2e_assert_eq "shadow-repair reinstall adds one disabled zsh alias marker" "$((ZSH_ALIAS_DISABLE_COUNT_BEFORE_REPAIR + 1))" "$ZSH_ALIAS_DISABLE_COUNT_REPAIR"
+e2e_assert_eq "shadow-repair reinstall adds one disabled bash alias marker" "$((BASH_ALIAS_DISABLE_COUNT_BEFORE_REPAIR + 1))" "$BASH_ALIAS_DISABLE_COUNT_REPAIR"
 
 set +e
 INTERACTIVE_RESOLUTION="$(
